improvement.problem: A structurally valid and signed deployment proof can still be stale or implausibly future-dated.

verification.runtime: isolated Node runtime using byte-identical committed source and test

limits: Freshness does not prove that Cloudflare deployed the source.
Freshness does not authenticate the signer or hostname.
Freshness does not establish scientific, diagnostic, or treatment truth.
The Cloudflare environment credentials remain externally unconfigured.
falsification_route: Provide a proof older than the configured maximum age, more than the allowed clock skew in the future, or without a parseable generated_at value; the validator must reject it.
